seedanceSegments.title: Hook radial tortilla cut
seedanceSegments.description: Texture-first radial slit through flat tortilla; quadrant geometry revealed.
seedanceSegments.prompt: Use @KitchenLayoutContextWide as structural kitchen context. Use @KitchenIslandOverhead as overhead cutting board framing. Use @KitchenIslandDefault to preserve terrazzo and island identity if the shot widens. Use @TortillaRadialCut only as the radial slit geometry lock (single cut center to one edge, four implied sectors, ~25 cm tortilla, not oversized, not miniature). Generate exactly 5 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 5 seconds, no slow motion, no soft transitions, no extra shots. TikTok/Reels food ASMR style, texture-first, no text on screen. Integrated audio: no speech, no voiceover, no music. Mandatory audio: soft tortilla tear, knife scrape, ambient board.Mandatory timing: 0.0-1.0s knife tip pierces tortilla center; 1.0-2.2s radial slit completes and sectors read clearly; 2.2-3.2s overhead flat tortilla matte; 3.2-4.2s board context on terrazzo; 4.2-5.0s close on empty sector lines. Scale lock: tortilla diameter ~25 cm (10 in), one radial slit only, not a full diameter cut, not two slits. Kitchen continuity lock: preserve light terrazzo countertop, same Licorn cabinet layout, black flush induction plate when visible, no redesigned kitchen. Global negatives: no text, no music, no pre-filled quadrants in hook, no character, no rolling burrito shape.

seedanceSegments.continuity: Opening texture-first; scene 2 pays off scene 1. Tortilla ~25 cm.
seedanceSegments.risk: Model may add second slit or pre-fill quadrants early.
seedanceSegments.audioPrompt: soft tortilla tear; knife scrape finish

seedanceSegments.title: Taco beef sizzle and spice
seedanceSegments.description: Brown beef, spice bloom, stir coat, spoon lift.
seedanceSegments.prompt: Use @KitchenLayoutContextWide as structural kitchen context. Use @InductionCloseup for macro pan actions. Use @InductionWide if framing widens. Use @SaucepanLarge only as pan shape. Use @SiliconeSpatula and @Spoon only as utensil shapes. Generate exactly 6 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 6 seconds, no slow motion, no extra shots, no text. Integrated audio: no speech, no voiceover, no music. Mandatory audio: sizzle burst, spice hiss, spatula scrape, spoon lift squish.Mandatory timing: 0.0-1.0s beef hits hot pan sizzle; 1.0-2.1s crumb browns with steam; 2.1-3.1s rust spice dust blooms; 3.1-4.2s spatula folds even coat; 4.2-5.2s wide pan context; 5.2-6.0s spoon lifts glossy crumb. Scale lock: beef crumb clumps 4-8 mm, pan occupies lower two-thirds of frame. Kitchen continuity: same black flush induction plate, light terrazzo visible at frame edge. Kitchen continuity lock: preserve light terrazzo countertop, same Licorn cabinet layout, black flush induction plate when visible, no redesigned kitchen. Global negatives: no pink raw center, no burnt black crumb, no cloth in hand, no text.

seedanceSegments.continuity: Beef crumb scale 4-8 mm; induction plate consistent.
seedanceSegments.risk: Undercooked pink or burnt black crumb.
seedanceSegments.audioPrompt: sizzle burst; spice hiss; spoon lift squish

seedanceSegments.title: Four-quadrant fill mosaic
seedanceSegments.description: Place lettuce-tomato, cream-chips, cheese-beef, cheese; full color mosaic.
seedanceSegments.prompt: Use @KitchenLayoutContextWide as structural kitchen context. Use @KitchenIslandOverhead for top-down fill shots. Use @KitchenIslandDefault for terrazzo lock. Use @WrapQuadrantsFilled only as the four-quadrant color and placement lock (lettuce-tomato / sour cream-chips / cheese-beef / cheese-only). Use @Spoon only as spoon shape for cream portions. Generate exactly 7 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 7 seconds, no extra shots, no text. Integrated audio: no speech, no voiceover, no music. Mandatory audio: lettuce rustle, cream swipe, cheese sprinkle, chip micro crunch.Mandatory timing: 0.0-1.0s lettuce-tomato quadrant; 1.0-2.1s sour cream and 3-5 chips; 2.1-3.1s cheese-beef quadrant; 3.1-4.0s extra cheese quarter; 4.0-5.2s full four-color mosaic; 5.2-6.2s island context; 6.2-7.0s macro chip under cream weight. Plating quantity lock: modest lettuce handful, 4-6 tomato pieces, 3-5 chips 4-6 cm each, thin beef layer not a mound. Kitchen continuity lock: preserve light terrazzo countertop, same Licorn cabinet layout, black flush induction plate when visible, no redesigned kitchen. Global negatives: no fold yet, no grill marks, no oversized chips, no text.

seedanceSegments.continuity: Chip count 3-5; tortilla still flat with radial slit.
seedanceSegments.risk: Chip scale drift oversized; beef mound too tall.
seedanceSegments.audioPrompt: lettuce rustle; cream swipe; chip micro crunch

seedanceSegments.title: Sequential fold to triangle
seedanceSegments.description: Three-step fold cascade, seam press, handoff to pan.
seedanceSegments.prompt: Use @KitchenLayoutContextWide as structural kitchen context. Use @KitchenIslandOverhead for fold actions. Use @KitchenIslandDefault for identity. Use @WrapQuadrantsFilled as start state reference. Use @WrapFoldedTriangleRaw only as folded triangle geometry lock (~12 cm sides, ~3-4 cm thick, intact). Use @TurningSpatula only as rigid press tool shape. Generate exactly 8 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 8 seconds, no extra shots, no text. Integrated audio: no speech, no voiceover, no music. Mandatory audio: soft fold thud, press creak, pan contact sizzle.Mandatory timing: 0.0-1.0s first quadrant lift; 1.0-2.2s fold across to top-right; 2.2-3.4s final fold to triangle; 3.4-4.4s side profile layer seam; 4.4-5.4s spatula seam press; 5.4-6.4s ungrilled triangle context; 6.4-7.2s top-down pale triangle; 7.2-8.0s triangle slides to pan with contact sizzle. Prefer hard cut from filled reference to folded reference if live fold drifts. Kitchen continuity lock: preserve light terrazzo countertop, same Licorn cabinet layout, black flush induction plate when visible, no redesigned kitchen. Global negatives: no burrito roll, no sliced cross-section, no grill marks yet, no cloth, no text.
seedanceSegments.promptInitial: Use @KitchenLayoutContextWide as structural kitchen context. Use @KitchenIslandOverhead for fold actions. Use @KitchenIslandDefault for identity. Kitchen continuity lock: preserve light terrazzo countertop, same Licorn cabinet layout, black flush induction plate when visible, no redesigned kitchen. Global negatives: no burrito roll, no sliced cross-section, no grill marks yet, no cloth, no text.
seedanceSegments.continuity: Triangle ~12 cm per side; prefer hard cuts between fold states.
seedanceSegments.risk: Model may roll burrito instead of quarter-fold triangle.
seedanceSegments.audioPrompt: soft fold thud; press creak; contact sizzle

seedanceSegments.title: Grill crisp and cheese melt
seedanceSegments.description: Press, cheese ooze, crisp lattice, single flip, steam on intact triangle.
seedanceSegments.prompt: Use @KitchenLayoutContextWide as structural kitchen context. Use @InductionCloseup for grill macro. Use @InductionWide for context shot. Use @WrapFoldedTriangleRaw as pre-grill state. Use @WrapGrilledGolden only as post-grill color and crisp skin lock (amber-gold lattice, cheese peek, intact triangle). Use @TurningSpatula only as press and flip tool. Generate exactly 6 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 7 seconds, no extra shots, no text. Integrated audio: no speech, no voiceover, no music. Mandatory audio: press sizzle, bubble pop, shell crackle, flip thud, steam whisper.Mandatory timing: 0.0-1.2s press and sizzle; 1.2-2.4s cheese ooze macro; 2.4-3.6s shell crisp lattice; 3.6-4.8s single spatula flip; 4.8-5.8s wide pan context; 5.8-7.0s steam off intact triangle. Destructive food-porn allowed here only: no bite, no slice—only press, flip, and cheese pull at seam. Kitchen continuity lock: preserve light terrazzo countertop, same Licorn cabinet layout, black flush induction plate when visible, no redesigned kitchen. Global negatives: no black char shell, no collapsed flat disc, no second flip, no cloth fused to hand, no text.

seedanceSegments.continuity: Triangle stays intact; amber-gold not black char.
seedanceSegments.audioPrompt: press sizzle; bubble pop; crackle; flip thud

seedanceSegments.title: Hero intact triangle
seedanceSegments.description: Intact grilled triangle on island; character satisfied; no dish contact.
seedanceSegments.prompt: Use @KitchenLayoutContextWide as structural kitchen context. Use @KitchenIslandDefault as hero surface. Use @WrapGrilledGolden and @FinalDishVisual only as the same intact golden triangle identity (not sliced, not spooned). Use @CharacterSheet and @PoseThreeQuarterRight for character identity and satisfied approach—character does not touch the dish. Generate exactly 6 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 5 seconds, no extra shots, no text. Integrated audio: no speech, no voiceover, no music. Mandatory audio: residual sizzle tail, kitchen room tone.Mandatory timing: 0.0-1.3s hero triangle intact on island with steam; 1.3-2.3s cheese seam macro; 2.3-3.5s wider kitchen context; 3.5-4.5s side profile scale lock; 4.5-5.0s character satisfied hold with untouched dish. Continuity: dish remains motionless and intact through last frame for standardized outro handoff. Kitchen continuity lock: preserve light terrazzo countertop, same Licorn cabinet layout, black flush induction plate when visible, no redesigned kitchen. Global negatives: no slice, no fork bite, no spoon dive, no garnish drop on dish, no speech, no text.

seedanceSegments.title: Licorn celebration outro
seedanceSegments.description: Standardized Licorn celebration outro; Recipe2Video injects canonical prompt and timing at sync.
